description.value:
A leather courier's satchel, frozen stiff with cold. Inside:

  • A sealed letter addressed to 'The Watch-Commander, Stairwatch' — the King's cipher, but not Harald's personal seal
  • 2 days' rations (frozen solid, edible once thawed)
  • A Chainwarden map of Titan's Stair annotated with hazard marks (+1 advantage on one navigation test in the next montage test)

DM Notes

Found: Hanging from the hand of a frozen Chainwarden courier on the mountain road (Beat 4b, Part 2). The courier has been dead approximately four days — snow has drifted against one shoulder. A Chainwarden runner by the badge.

Contents: The Sealed Letter from V.A. (addressed to Watch-Commander, Stairwatch), 2 days' frozen rations, and a small Chainwarden map of Titan's Stair with hazard annotations. Award each piece as a separate item or bundle as a single find.

Significance: The letter confirms the leak in Hrafnborg — someone besides Harald knows the PCs left. Whether this is Dreyfus's Wyrd-channel reporting through a mortal official, or an independent traitor, cannot be determined from the letter alone. Let the PCs feel the web tightening.
